body:
Precipitation cache followed an old pattern and was:
- defined separately from precomputed quantities
- updated when the precipitation tendency was called.

This was making it difficult to track "who gets updated when" when coupling 1M microphysics with EDMF. This PR moves all precipitation cache into precomputed quantities
title: Move precipitation cache to precomputed quantities

body:
This PR encapsulates the rrtmgp model kwargs, and will also allow us to dispatch on the radiation mode.

This should help make it more clear what kwargs are passed to `RRTMGPModel`, so that we can start tackling refactoring of the views (which all depend on the input kwargs).

I think more is needed, but this is a start and I want to make sure I haven't broken anything.
title: Encapsulate rrtmgp model kwargs
